nasb.text: Then the king of Assyria commanded, saying, “Take there one of the priests whom you carried away into exile and let him go and live there; and let him teach them the custom of the god of the land.”

esv.text: Then the king of Assyria commanded, “Send there one of the priests whom you carried away from there, and let him go and dwell there and teach them the law of the god of the land.”

cnv.text: 於是亞述王下令：“我從那裡擄來的祭司中，要叫一個回到那裡去。他要去住在那裡，教導他們當地的神的規矩。”

ccb.text: 亚述王便下令：“派一位被掳来的祭司回去，让他住在那里，把当地神明的规矩教导给他们。”
